panels.description: Number of Zone Ingress proxy replicas connected to the control plane.
panels.title: Zone Ingress connected

panels.description: Uptime of each Zone Ingress proxy replica.
panels.title: Ingress Uptime (per replica)

panels.description: Days until the soonest-expiring certificate on any zone proxy.
panels.title: Min Cert Expiry

panels.description:
Active downstream connections on each zone proxy.

Terminology: **downstream** = incoming side (cross-zone clients connecting to this Zone Ingress); **upstream** = outgoing side (local services this Zone Ingress routes to).
panels.title: Active Downstream Connections

panels.description:
Upstream request rate handled by each zone proxy.

Terminology: **downstream** = incoming side (cross-zone clients connecting to this Zone Ingress); **upstream** = outgoing side (local services this Zone Ingress routes to).
panels.title: Upstream Request Rate

panels.description: Heap memory used by each zone proxy's Envoy process.
panels.title: Proxy Memory (heap)

panels.description: Each Zone Ingress replica's connection to the Zone control plane.
panels.title: CP Connected (per replica)

panels.description: Active downstream connections accepted from other zones.
panels.title: Active Downstream Cx

panels.description: New inbound connection rate.
panels.title: Inbound Cx Rate

panels.description: Upstream request rate to local services.
panels.title: Upstream Req Rate

panels.description: Failed upstream connection attempts from the Zone Ingress.
panels.title: Upstream Cx Failures

panels.description:
Inbound connection rate into the Zone Ingress. The TCP listener terminates the cross-zone mTLS tunnels from other zones.

Terminology: **downstream** = incoming side (cross-zone clients connecting to this Zone Ingress); **upstream** = outgoing side (local services this Zone Ingress routes to).
panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  Connection Rate

panels.description:
Bytes received and sent on the Zone Ingress TCP listener.

`rx` = bytes received from the peer, `tx` = bytes transmitted to the peer.
panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  Throughput

panels.description: Upstream request rate from the Zone Ingress to local services, by destination cluster.

targets.expr: label_replace(sum by (pod, envoy_cluster_name) (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_total{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", proxy="ingress", envoy_cluster_name!~"kuma_.*|_kuma_.*|access_log_sink|.*passthrough.*|.*transparentproxy.*"}[$__rate_interval])), "replica", "$2", "pod", "^kuma-default-(ingress|egress)-[^-]+-(.+)$")

panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  Upstream Request Rate by Service

panels.description: p95 request latency from the Zone Ingress to local services. Connect-time is omitted because cross-zone connections to the ingress are long-lived mTLS tunnels and rarely produce new connect samples.

targets.expr: label_replace(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (pod, le, envoy_cluster_name) (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq_time_bucket{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", proxy="ingress", envoy_cluster_name!~"kuma_.*|_kuma_.*|access_log_sink|.*passthrough.*|.*transparentproxy.*"}[$__rate_interval]))), "replica", "$2", "pod", "^kuma-default-(ingress|egress)-[^-]+-(.+)$")

panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  Upstream Request Latency (p95)

panels.description: Healthy vs total endpoints in each upstream cluster of the Zone Ingress.

targets.expr: label_replace(sum by (pod, envoy_cluster_name) (envoy_cluster_membership_healthy{job="kuma-zone-proxies", namespace=~"$namespace", zone=~"$zone", proxy="ingress", envoy_cluster_name!~"kuma_.*|_kuma_.*|access_log_sink|.*passthrough.*|.*transparentproxy.*"}), "replica", "$2", "pod", "^kuma-default-(ingress|egress)-[^-]+-(.+)$")

panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  Upstream Cluster Health

panels.description: mTLS handshakes and verification failures on the Zone Ingress listener.
panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  mTLS Handshakes & Failures

panels.description: Number of clusters with an open circuit breaker (the proxy is shedding load).
panels.title: Circuit Breakers Open

panels.description: Upstream request retries and timeouts across the zone proxy clusters.
panels.title: Upstream Retries & Timeouts

panels.description: Requests dropped because the pending queue or the connection pool overflowed.
panels.title: Request Queue & Pool Saturation

panels.description: Connections rejected at the zone proxy listener (global limit overflow or overload manager).
panels.title: Rejected Downstream Connections

panels.description: Upstream connections closed by the remote end while a request was still active.
panels.title: Abnormal Upstream Disconnects

panels.description: Event-loop watchdog misses - the zone proxy's Envoy is starved of CPU.
panels.title: Envoy Watchdog Misses

panels.description: Response codes returned by local services to the Zone Ingress, by class.
panels.title: Zone Ingress  -  Upstream Response Codes
Config Delivery Health  -  zone proxy xDS

panels.description: Config updates rejected by the zone proxy. Any sustained value means the CP pushed config the proxy could not accept.
panels.title: xDS Update Rejections (NACKs)

panels.description: Config requests in flight between the zone proxy and the control plane.
panels.title: xDS Config Requests Pending

panels.description: Config updates accepted by the zone proxy. CDS / LDS ACKs from the CP.
panels.title: xDS Update Acceptance (ACKs)
